creator: john_m_cooper@yahoo.com
text:
This is GLADE (not to be confused with GNOME's glade), an implementation of the Ada Distributive Computing Annex.  It is similar to lang/gnat-glade, but gnat-glade will no longer compile with the lastest version of lang/gnat.  Moreover, this is the most recent version of GLADE.  Given the distributive computing nature of this port, location in net is more appropirate.  However, it owes something to lang/gnat-glade, and so a repo-copy should probably be made.

How-To-Repeat: 

n/a
